books.title: Mrityunjaya
books.author: Shivaji Sawant
books.description: Mrityunjay (Triumph Over Death) is a renowned Marathi novel by Shivaji Sawant based on the life of Karna, a central, tragic character from the Mahabharata. Written as an autobiography, the book explores Karna’s life, his struggle with casteism, loyalty to Duryodhana, and his philosophical battles, portraying him as a legendary "winner over death".....
